input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for DID.
input_context.outcome_question: Recommend the XRP-native YES/NO vote/outcome for this named decision surface from pre-outcome facts only.

source_facts.claim: DID: Adds to the ledger Decentralized Identifier (DID) functionality that conforms to the World Wide Web Consortium standard. DIDs provide a digital identity, not dependent on a centralized authority and controlled by the DID subject. Adds new transactions: - DIDDelete - Delete the DID associated with your XRPL account. - DIDSet - Create a new DID or update an existing one. Adds a new DID ledger entry type. Adds several new transaction result codes.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
DID appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 2.0.0.
